chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1927 of 2024 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3795/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 24.02.2025 Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. 1. Urgency granted. 2. This petition remains pending for orders as to maintainability. There are several Division Bench judgments of this court wherein it has been held that the concerned respondents is not amenable to writ jurisdiction on account of absence of statutory rules. Even otherwise, prayer clause seeks negative declaration which could not be demonstrated to be entertainable in the presence circumstances. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
